description_long: This is a small, golden-brown bread roll with a soft, slightly glossy crust and a series of evenly spaced, shallow ridges running lengthwise along its surface. The bread has a plump, rounded shape that tapers slightly at one end, giving it a conical appearance. One end of the bread is open, revealing a dark chocolate or cream filling inside, which contrasts with the pale, fluffy interior. The crust appears to be thin and tender, with a subtle sheen suggesting a light egg wash. The overall texture of the bread looks soft and airy, with a delicate crumb structure visible at the open end. This type of bread is commonly found in urban bakeries and street food stalls, often enjoyed as a sweet snack or breakfast item.
description: A golden-brown, ridged bread roll with a soft crust and a visible chocolate or cream filling at one end. The bread is plump, slightly conical, and has a glossy, tender surface.
description_view_0: The bread is shown from the side, highlighting its rounded, ridged surface and golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the tapered end and the smooth, slightly lighter crust, with the ridges less pronounced.
description_view_2: The open end with the dark chocolate or cream filling is visible, showing the contrast between the filling and the pale interior.
description_view_3: A direct view of the open end, clearly displaying the dark filling surrounded by the soft, airy bread interior.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a series of shallow, evenly spaced ridges running lengthwise, giving it a segmented appearance. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible seeds or flour dusting.
